requirement: Liability capped at 12 months of fees paid. No unlimited liability.
Either party can terminate with 30 days written notice.
No auto-renewal. Contract requires explicit renewal.
We retain ownership of all pre-existing IP. Work product IP transfers on final payment.
No non-compete clauses. Non-solicitation limited to 12 months.
Net 30 payment terms. No upfront payment exceeding 25% of total.
Mutual indemnification only. No one-sided indemnity clauses.
Governed by Delaware law. Disputes resolved by arbitration.
